case_title: L C GENERAL ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC. VS TRAHAN MECHANICAL INC.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO TRAHAN MECHANICAL INC RETURNED--ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRAHAN MECHANICAL INC. PER ARTICLE 6 OF THE CONTRACT BETWEEN THE PLTF & DEFT, SECTION 6.1.1 STATES: "ANY CLAIM ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO THIS SUBCONTRACT.. SHALL BE SUBJECT TO MEDIATION AS A CONDITION PRECEDENT TO ARBITRATION OF THE INSTITUTION OF LEGAL OR EQUITABLE PROCEEDINGS BY EITHER PARTY. SEE ALSO SECTION 6.2.1. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY L C GENERAL ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TRAHAN MECHANICAL INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRAHAN MECHANICAL INC.
